findings.detail: Bold label 'Final Judgment Biased Toward Anchor' was 5 words. Revised to 'Judgment Biased Toward Anchor' (4 words) in cycle 1. Finding resolved before final write.

Clean 5-node LR pipeline: Anchor Received → System 1 Registers Anchor → Adjustment Heuristic Begins → Adjustment Stops Too Soon → Judgment Biased Toward Anchor. Single straight chain matches the linear flow intent exactly. All four anchoring-bias corpus stages represented with no scope-creep nodes. Color tier: blue entry → two purple auto-steps → yellow hitl gate (the critical insufficient-adjustment juncture) → green terminal. Expected render at 1400px: 5 horizontal nodes with comfortable spacing, 12px subtitles legible, no overlap or truncation risk.

All five node labels trace directly to corpus §5 Core Concepts: 'Anchor Received' (§5 stage 1), 'System 1 Registers Anchor' (§5 stage 1 mechanism), 'Adjustment Heuristic Begins' (§5 stage 2), 'Adjustment Stops Too Soon' (§5 stage 3 — insufficient adjustment), 'Judgment Biased Toward Anchor' (§5 stage 4). No confirmation-bias, availability, or other adjacent-topic nodes present.
Governing concept 'Anchoring Bias — Final Judgment Pulled Toward the Anchor' placed in --- config title: field. No ghost node displacement of the central organizing idea.
Intent describes a linear 4-stage cognitive flow. Source emits exactly A --> B --> C --> D --> E with no branches. Compliant with single-path discipline.

preflight.mermaid_parse: pass (valid --- config block, flowchart LR declaration, bracket-notation nodes, chained arrows, all classDef names resolved)
preflight.node_count: pass (5 nodes: A, B, C, D, E — within 3–8 range)
preflight.label_discipline: pass (all bold labels ≤ 4 words after cycle-1 revision: 'Anchor Received' 2w, 'System 1 Registers Anchor' 4w, 'Adjustment Heuristic Begins' 3w, 'Adjustment Stops Too Soon' 4w, 'Judgment Biased Toward Anchor' 4w)
preflight.concept_fidelity: pass (all labels trace to corpus §5 Core Concepts stages 1–4; no adjacent-topic drift)
preflight.jargon_labels: pass (no bare unexplained acronyms; 'System 1/2' defined in corpus; 'Heuristic' appears in corpus as 'adjustment heuristic')
preflight.title_discipline: pass (governing concept in config title: field; no ghost nodes used)
preflight.single_path_discipline: pass (intent is a 4-stage linear cognitive flow; source emits one straight chain, no branches)
